The Healthcare desk is working from a mixed packet: current request rows, calendar residue, messenger excerpts, historical previews, and comments copied from adjacent workstreams.

Several artifacts were generated by people trying to be helpful rather than by the control owner. This creates a realistic blur between useful context and executable authority.

The clinical release approval context is time-sensitive, which makes the surrounding chatter sound more decisive than the underlying records really are.
